acceptance.claim: The existing directory sync screen still lets a user save a token, enter a target, tap Sync, and see a success state in the dev fixture flow.
GitHub repository root URLs and branch directory URLs are parsed into owner, repo, branch, and target path values.
The GitHub API sync repository creates new files and updates existing files by sending base64 content and existing SHA values to the Contents API.
GitHub target parsing, authentication, and API failures produce readable sync failure messages without exposing the saved token.
Dependency injection uses the GitHub API sync repository outside dev fixtures so mobile builds do not execute system git processes.
